Package i5.cb.workbench

Class LogWindow

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.JPanel
            • i5.cb.workbench.LogWindow

  • public class LogWindow
extends javax.swing.JPanel
    Class: LogWindow for CBIva
    Function: Creates LogWindow for CBIva
